data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making process by minimizing choices.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes the size and placement of clickable elements.
data.technical_spec: Easily accessible 'Add to Cart' buttons, enlarged touch targets.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Maintains cognitive load by grouping information into chunks.
data.technical_spec: Product categories, filter options, selection assistant guides.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design is consistent with user expectations based on their previous experiences.
data.technical_spec: Standardized design patterns, consistent UI elements across services.

data.title: Tesler’s Law
data.description: Manages complexity by hiding sophisticated functionalities behind simple interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Advanced search options, recommendation engines, customizable user settings.
